scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@rusttools/shared && npm run build --workspace=@rusttools/db && npm run build --workspace=@rusttools/rustplus-client && npm run build --workspace=@rusttools/api && npm run build --workspace=@rusttools/web && npm run build --workspace=@rusttools/discord-bot
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web,bot -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=@rusttools/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@rusttools/web" "npm run dev --workspace=@rusttools/discord-bot"
